cases.label: happy_path

input.strategy_route: Promote a business hotel for weekday solo travelers using location-to-destination fit, breakfast and invoice clarity, and a consultative booking CTA
input.offer_info: weekday business rooms, breakfast options, invoice support, parking guidance, in-room desk, no exaggerated ranking claims
input.audience_segment: solo business travelers visiting office parks, client offices, or meetings in the city

mustInclude: task-based opening around business travel or next-day meetings
specific proof around location fit, breakfast, invoice, parking, or work-friendly room details
CTA that asks for dates, number of nights, destination, and whether invoice or breakfast is needed

cases.label: happy_path

input.strategy_route: Drive team bookings for a business hotel near a convention center using group-coordination proof and a low-pressure consultation flow
input.offer_info: multi-room booking support, breakfast coordination, transport guidance, invoice handling, nearby convenience stores and late arrival support
input.audience_segment: office admins, project leads, and event teams arranging several rooms for exhibitions or short business stays

mustInclude: opening tied to team travel coordination or exhibition accommodation pressure
trust modules around room-count confirmation, breakfast, invoice, and arrival logistics
next step asking for dates, room count, team schedule, and invoice requirements
mustAvoid: guaranteed upgrade or late checkout language

cases.label: edge_case

input.strategy_route: Write business hotel copy for a cost-sensitive company inquiry with unclear room count, mixed stay lengths, and incomplete travel details
input.offer_info: company lodging under discussion, limited information, potentially mixed single and twin room needs, invoice required but details still unclear
input.audience_segment: administrative staff comparing several hotels for a small business travel group

mustInclude: implicit request for missing dates, room count, room mix, or invoice details
conservative wording around rates and inclusions
scenario-based framing instead of a single exact quote
mustAvoid: claiming every request can be met without confirmation

cases.label: edge_case

input.strategy_route: Promote a business hotel for late-arrival and early-departure travelers when proof assets are limited and sleep claims must stay conservative
input.offer_info: late check-in friendly operations, simple breakfast arrangement, practical room layout, limited photo assets, no hard urgency
input.audience_segment: travelers arriving by late train or flight before an early meeting the next morning

mustInclude: opening anchored to late arrival and next-day schedule pressure
practical arrival or departure convenience instead of decorative positioning
conservative handling of quietness, comfort, and sleep language

cases.label: failure_case

input.strategy_route: Grow bookings fast for a business hotel using aggressive ranking claims, guaranteed convenience messaging, and hard urgency
input.offer_info: busy dates, pressure to fill rooms quickly, mixed traveler scenarios, desire to push direct booking fast
input.audience_segment: cold business travel traffic comparing several city hotels

mustInclude: explicit identification of risky sales phrases in risk_phrases
reframed urgency into planning or date-confirmation guidance
trust built through destination fit and business-travel proof instead of hype
mustAvoid: number-one or top-ranked claims without evidence

cases.label: failure_case

input.strategy_route: Push immediate conversion for a business hotel by promising zero noise, five-star experience, guaranteed upgrades, and the city's lowest rate
input.offer_info: pricing-sensitive offer, uncertain occupancy, desire to overstate comfort and service outcomes, multiple risk points in copy
input.audience_segment: mixed cold leads asking for quick business travel booking decisions

mustInclude: clear conservative rewrite of comfort, price, and service promises
explicit marking of red-flag expressions in risk_phrases
CTA focused on dates, nights, room count, and stay requirements before confirming options
